verses.text: Destroy all the places where the nations served their gods. Destroy. Idolatry is rooted out.
Destroy all the places where the nations served their gods. Destroy. Idolatry is rooted out.
Destroy all the places where the nations served their gods. Destroy. Idolatry is rooted out.
Worship at the place God chooses, bringing your offerings. One place. God appoints where He is sought.
Worship at the place God chooses, bringing your offerings. One place. God appoints where He is sought.
Worship at the place God chooses, bringing your offerings. One place. God appoints where He is sought.
Worship at the place God chooses, bringing your offerings. One place. God appoints where He is sought.
Not every man as he pleases, but at His chosen place. Order. Worship is not by whim.
Not every man as he pleases, but at His chosen place. Order. Worship is not by whim.
Not every man as he pleases, but at His chosen place. Order. Worship is not by whim.
Not every man as he pleases, but at His chosen place. Order. Worship is not by whim.
Not every man as he pleases, but at His chosen place. Order. Worship is not by whim.
Offer not your burnt offerings in every place. Beware. God orders His worship.
Offer not your burnt offerings in every place. Beware. God orders His worship.
You may eat flesh freely, but pour out the blood. No blood. Life belongs to God.
You may eat flesh freely, but pour out the blood. No blood. Life belongs to God.
Eat the tithes only at His place; forsake not the Levite. The Levite. Care for God's servants.
Eat the tithes only at His place; forsake not the Levite. The Levite. Care for God's servants.
Eat the tithes only at His place; forsake not the Levite. The Levite. Care for God's servants.
When the land is enlarged, you may eat flesh in your gates. Freedom. God gives liberty in food.
When the land is enlarged, you may eat flesh in your gates. Freedom. God gives liberty in food.
When the land is enlarged, you may eat flesh in your gates. Freedom. God gives liberty in food.
Only eat not the blood, that it go well with you. No blood. Reverence for life is kept.
Only eat not the blood, that it go well with you. No blood. Reverence for life is kept.
Only eat not the blood, that it go well with you. No blood. Reverence for life is kept.
Bring your holy things to His chosen place. Bring. Worship centres on God.
Bring your holy things to His chosen place. Bring. Worship centres on God.
Bring your holy things to His chosen place. Bring. Worship centres on God.
Inquire not after their gods, nor worship as they did. No imitation. Pagan ways are abhorred.
Inquire not after their gods, nor worship as they did. No imitation. Pagan ways are abhorred.
Inquire not after their gods, nor worship as they did. No imitation. Pagan ways are abhorred.
Add not to the word, nor take from it. Whole word. Keep God's command intact.
